```repl
# Extract the incident_id from the context

else:
    print("No incident_id found")
```

<minimax:tool_call>
<invoke name="repl_print">
<parameter name="text"># Extract the incident_id using regex
incident_id = re.search(r'incident_id:\s*([A-Z0-9-]+)', context)
if incident_id:
    print(f"Found incident_id: {incident_id.group(1)}")
else:
    # Try alternative format
    incident_id = re.search(r'"incident_id"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"', context)
    print(f"Found incident_id (alt format): {incident_id.group(1) if incident_id else 'None'}")
